# Define eligibility conditions
        # Age must be at least 21 (federal requirement in the US)
        age_eligible = self.age >= 21
        
        # Driving experience must be at least 2 years
        experience_eligible = self.driving_experience_years >= 2
        
        # Must have a valid employment status (not retired or unemployed)
        employment_eligible = self.employment_status in ['employed', 'student']
        
        # Must have at least high school education
        education_eligible = self.education in ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']
        
        # Must not have any disqualifying conditions (all other attributes are acceptable)
        # All genders, races, marital statuses, and religions are acceptable
        
        # Return True only if all conditions are met
        return age_eligible and experience_eligible and employment_eligible and education_eligible
